creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: stefan
Date: Mon May 13 16:11:09 2013
New Revision: 318119
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/318119

Log:
  Add missing USE_GMAKE.
  
  PR:		169807
  Submitted by:	Volodymyr Kostyrko <c.kworr@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/multimedia/gnome-mplayer/Makefile

Modified: head/multimedia/gnome-mplayer/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/gnome-mplayer/Makefile	Mon May 13 16:02:31 2013	(r318118)
+++ head/multimedia/gnome-mplayer/Makefile	Mon May 13 16:11:09 2013	(r318119)
@@ -24,6 +24,7 @@ NAUPLUG_DESC=	Enable Nautilus plugin
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
+USE_GMAKE=	yes
 USE_GNOME=	glib20
 USE_XORG=	x11 xscrnsaver
 INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
